title: Cluster Firework Rocket
description: Add 3 new type firework rocket but it's cluster bomb.
body:
# **Brief Introduction**
Add 3 new type of firework rocket, but it's cluster bomb. These 3 types are Exploding, Burning and Arrow. Player can use the vanilla firework rocket and different materials to craft it. These firework can also be shoot with crossbow like vanilla firework.

# **Results Show**
![Burning Cluster Firework](https://s3.bmp.ovh/imgs/2024/05/17/b37f55038e1952f9.png)

# **Base Crafting Recipes**
You can use TNT, Fire Charge, or Arrow respectively to crafting Exploding, Burning, or Arrow type. It's shapeless recipe. The 'Bomblet Count' is 3 times that of material count. We use 8 material to crafting and obtain a new cluster firework rocket but the Bomblet Count is 24, as shown in the following figure.
![Exploding Type](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2d20f7f6fdf44d5acef7399f533d6ea339e7055.png)
![Burning Type](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d41ac1f610fdf2a0f516aab3d8bf729166e118da.png)
![Arrow Type](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92c98e8dbaacf973775f3eda069c8b2d54ec8542.png)

### If you already have a cluster firework rocket, you can still continue to use same material and above mentioned recipes to add more bomblet count.

# **Enhance the Cluster Firework**
### You can respectively use the Gun Powder, Blaze Powder or Iron Ingot to enhance these firework.
1. Gun Powder: For Exploding type. It can enhance the explosion power of each bomblet. The base explosion power of each bomblet is 1.5. One Gun Powder can enhance 0.15 explosion power of each bomblet.
2. Blaze Powder: For Burning type. It can enhance burning time and damage when those bomblet hit to living entity.
3. Iron Ingot: For Arrow type. It can enhance damage when arrow hit to living entity.
4. **If you have 2 or more cluster firework with same bomblet type, you can even use it to crafting a new cluster firework. The Bomblet Count and Enhancement Level will be stacked together!**
